bundleProductId.title: Bundle Product Id
bundleProductId.description: The Product2 ID of the bundle; every instance of this product on the quote is updated

childProductId.title: Child Product Id
childProductId.description: DESELECT only: the Product2 ID of the component to turn off across all instances

groupNames.title: Group Names
groupNames.description: Optional. Comma-separated group/region names to limit the change to, e.g. 'California, New York'. Matched groups include their subgroups automatically. Leave blank to apply to every instance on the quote.

operation.title: Operation
operation.description: SELECT to turn a component on for every bundle instance, DESELECT to turn it off

productRelatedComponentId.title: Product Related Component Id
productRelatedComponentId.description: SELECT only: the option to turn on across all instances (from ListBundleComponentOptions)
